research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Mexiletine is a Class IB sodium-channel blocker; orally active analog of lidocaine with antiarrhythmic activity.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: Sodium-channel framing dominant; reader rarely multi-current frames. SEALED for blind evaluation.
